channel.title: 3d Printing on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in 3d Printing on Have an average day :|

item.title: 3D Printed Guns
item.description: I have to admit. I’ve been on the fence about this one for a while. I’ve been sitting around wondering what to write about this. Part of me is for this, as it’s going to spur conversation and further technology. I believe that people should have ability to manufacture anything they want, be it parts for a vacuum cleaner or a weapon. Part of me is scared about what this could do.
